title: orchis × parvifolia subsp. bicknellii
intro: Orchis × parvifolia subsp. bicknellii, also known as the Bicknell's orchid, is a rare and unique species of orchid that is a natural hybrid of two other orchid species. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The health benefits of Bicknell's orchid include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Bicknell's orchid can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is largely anecdotal and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
